title: CapeLib
description: CapeLib mod that allow you to get cape in game.
body:
![downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/capelib?logo=modrinth&style=flat-square)

CapeLib mod that allows you to wear any cape in game for free.

While in game click Esc to see new button that opens GUI with capes gallery. Find your favorite from thousands.

Mod uses https://minecraftcapes.net/ cape gallery.

[ Suggestions/bug reports](https://github.com/Coldi4k/CapeLib/issues)
